zh.Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England: 英國素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Lewknor於大約1437年出生在英國素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Lewknor46歲，母親Elizabeth Echingham44歲。她於大約1450年與John Pelham在英國素可結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年在英國素可享年35歲。

zh-hans.Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England: 英国素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Lewknor于大约1437年出生在英国素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Lewknor46岁，母亲Elizabeth Echingham44岁。她于大约1450年与John Pelham在英国素可结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年在英国素可享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Lewknor was born about 1437, in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Lewknor, was 46 and her mother, Elizabeth Echingham, was 44. She married John Pelham about 1450, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1471, in Sussex, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Lewknor est née environ 1437, à Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Lewknor, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Echingham, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé John Pelham environ 1450, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1471, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Lewknor um 1437 in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Lewknor 46 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Echingham 44. Sie hat um 1450 in Sussex, England John Pelham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1471 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lewknor è nata il circa 1437 nel Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Lewknor, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Echingham, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato John Pelham circa 1450, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1471, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスホールステド ケインス
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lewknorが約1437年にイギリススセックスホールステド ケインスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Lewknorは46歳，母Elizabeth Echinghamは44歳であった。約1450年にイギリススセックスでJohn Pelhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年にイギリススセックスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lewknor(이)가 대략 1437년 영국 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lewknor(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Echingham(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 수세스에서 John Pelham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 수세스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lewknor nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Lewknor, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Echingham, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com John Pelham aproximadamente 1450, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1471, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Lewknor родилась около 1437 г. в местности хаурстед кинесь, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lewknor было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Echingham, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pelham около 1450 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1471 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Lewknor nació aproximadamente 1437, en Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Lewknor, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Echingham, tenía 44 años. Se casó con John Pelham aproximadamente 1450, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1471, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
